pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier/setup scripts explicitly enforce this output path.
NEMA 23 standard specifications (mounting hole spacing is ~1.856 inches = 47.14 mm). Verified via web search.
NEMA 23 standard specifications (pilot/boss diameter is 1.50 inches = 38.1 mm). Verified via web search.
NEMA 23 standard specifications (mounting hole diameter is ~0.20 inches = 5.08 mm, commonly 5 mm for M5 screws). Verified via web search.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for solvespace_env nema23_stepper_mount_layout task by confirming that the agent constructs a new 2D layout from scratch, and independently verifying the expected NEMA 23 dimensions (47.14mm square, 38.1mm center bore, 5.0mm corner holes) against industry standards. The expected output file path was also confirmed via the task scripts.
